title: Pulling email address from Gmail integration
excerpt: I have Gmail integration set up to create a new item from emails. Is it possible to auto populate the senders email address in a field?

posts.author: jonathankobzoff (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml: I have Gmail integration set up to create a new item from emails. Is it possible to auto populate the senders email address in a field?

posts.author: tarrynjordaan (Tarryn Jordaan)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever find a solution for this? I’d ideally like to populate name as the pulse name, email the subject line and the body.
